name: PNC Infratech Limited
summary: PNC Infratech Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an infrastructure construction, development, and management company in India. The company undertakes various infrastructure projects, including highways, bridges, flyovers, power transmission lines, airport runways and pavements, industrial area development, track construction for rail freight corridors, and other infrastructure projects. It also provides end-to-end infrastructure implementation solutions, such as engineering, procurement, and construction services on a fixed-sum turnkey basis, as well as on an item rate basis; and executes and implements projects on a design-build-finance-operate-transfer, operate-maintain-transfer, hybrid annuity model, and other PPP formats. The company was formerly known as PNC Construction Company Limited and changed its name to PNC Infratech Limited in August 2007. PNC Infratech Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Agra, India.
